The '''Cinnabar Moon''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. It served as headquarters of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Eelysa]] and the [[Wild Knights]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

{{Moon-stub}}
